zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta von Nassau於大約1236年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧時，她的父親Heinrich II von Nassau58歲，母親Mathilde von Geldern39歲。她和Jan I van Cuijk至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1312年1月25日在荷蘭享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta von Nassau was born about 1236, in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, her father, Heinrich II von Nassau, was 58 and her mother, Mathilde von Geldern, was 39. She had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Jan I van Cuijk. She died on 25 January 1312, in Netherlands, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta von Nassau est née environ 1236, à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II von Nassau, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Geldern, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Jan I van Cuijk. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1312, à Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jutta von Nassau um 1236 in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich II von Nassau 58 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Geldern 39. Sie hatte mit Jan I van Cuijk mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1312 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Niederlande.

Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie con Jan I van Cuijk. Morì il 25 gennaio 1312, nel Paesi Bassi, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta von Nassau(이)가 대략 1236년 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라크레이스 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich II von Nassau(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Geldern(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Jan I van Cuijk(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 1월 25일 네덜란드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta von Nassau nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II von Nassau, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Geldern, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas com Jan I van Cuijk. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1312, em Países Baixos, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta von Nassau родилась около 1236 г. в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich II von Nassau было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Geldern, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Jan I van Cuijk. Она умерла 25 января 1312 г. в местности Нидерланды в возрасте 77 лет.
